main.description: Get tile file URLs covering a bounding box for a given collection

collection.description: The collection to get coverage for, e.g. 'org.atgeo.places.foursquare'

bbox.description: Bounding box as xmin,ymin,xmax,ymax in WGS84 decimal degrees

errors.name: BboxTooLarge
errors.description: The bounding box covers too many tiles

errors.name: CollectionNotFound
errors.description: The specified collection does not exist on this server

errors.name: InvalidBbox
errors.description: The bbox parameter must be four comma-separated numbers with xmin < xmax and ymin < ymax
